name_cn:
【Alma BB Handbag】m13078 Black Multicolor (Takashi Murakami)
This Alma BB handbag exudes the joyful style of the collaboration collection, cleverly revisiting the 1930s Art Deco design. The Monogram coated canvas renders the whimsical tones of Takashi Murakami's artwork, while the Toron handle, base, removable shoulder strap, and key pouch incorporate classic calfskin elements.
Dimensions: 23.5x17.5x 11.5cm
